content.en:
Second Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor - Poisonous Dragon!

Its powerful aura made the faces of all the Heavenly Ancestors present change, and only the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor could compete with this poisonous dragon.

"Everyone, I'll intercept this poisonous dragon, and you go deal with other Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures!"

The Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor commanded.

"Good!"

Many Heavenly Ancestors responded to the Dao.

Rumble!!!!

The battle is on!

There were several Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors who directly confronted those Blood Transformation Realm creatures and fought with them.

And there are many other Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures in the fragments of the Hidden Sea, and they are not afraid of death, if they intervene to help those few Blood Transformation Realm creatures, the Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors in the Ten Thousand Dragons Territorial Sea will not be able to bear it.

Last time, that's how they failed and escaped.

Therefore, other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors needed to intercept these Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures.

A Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor could easily kill an ordinary Heavenly Ancestor-level creature, but once there were too many of them, they would not be able to bear it.

Fortunately, the number of Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures here was not so terrifying that they would definitely not be able to bear it.

Most of the creatures in the Dark Sea Fragments still only have the strength of the invincible-level fifth-stage Great Ancestor.

At this time, Ye Tian also made a move.

He casually slapped a Heavenly Ancestor-level creature to death, and no matter how many other Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures attacked him, he couldn't break through his defenses.

In terms of strength, Ye Tian's combat power was much more powerful than that of an ordinary One-Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

"The strength of the Endless Heavenly Ancestor is so strong!"

Dongao Tianzu was shocked.

He thought that Ye Tian's strength was slightly weaker than his own, but now that he looks at it, he is obviously much stronger than him!

As time passed, one Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor began to get injured, but many of the creatures in the Dark Sea Fragments were also killed.

Seeing that there were not many Heavenly Ancestor-level creatures in the Fragment of the Dark Sea, and that other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors could deal with it, he was ready to help those Heavenly Ancestors who were fighting against the Blood Transformation Realm creatures of the Fragment of the Dark Sea.

If you can kill a Blood Mutant Creature, you can directly turn the tide of battle.

Swish!

Ye Tian rushed towards a Blood Transformation Realm creature, and it was the Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor who was fighting against this Blood Transformation Realm creature.

In terms of attack, the strength of the Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor is not weak, and the immeasurable supernatural power technique he cultivated is the Extreme Breaking Technique that is located in the thirty-third place of the Immeasurable Divine Power List, specializing in the technique of breaking defense, and the attack power is very terrifying.

"Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor, I'll help you!"

Ye Tian cast the Pole Technique, and pierced through the hole with one blow.

That Blood Transformation Realm creature was fighting against the Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor, so there was no way to dodge Ye Tian's attack, so he could only use his own defensive ability to shake this blow.

Burst!

The Extreme Technique directly broke through the body of this blood transformation realm creature, injuring him, but only slightly.

But after Ye Tian integrated the Pole Technique into his whole body, every attack could be integrated into the Pole Technique, so he could use the Pole Technique as an ordinary attack.

Puff puff!!!

The Extreme Technique made the blood transformation creature's injuries worse and worse.

"Well done!"

Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor was overjoyed.

He didn't expect that Ye Tian would be able to integrate the Extreme Technique of the first place in the Infinite Divine Power List into his whole body, and this kind of strength was already much stronger than the ordinary Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor.

With Ye Tian's help, he was sure to quickly kill this Blood Transformation Realm creature.

As time passed, the blood-mutated creature gradually turned into a heavy blow.

Ye Tian joined forces with the Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor and gradually beat this blood transformation creature to the point of its fall.

At this time, this Blood Transformation Realm creature wanted to escape, but how could Ye Tian let him escape!

"Ten arms and golden bodies, come over to me!"

Ye Tian's body kept changing, turning into a ten-armed golden body, and the ten arms grabbed this blood transformation creature, and the Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor took the opportunity to attack.

In the midst of the constant screams of this blood-mutated creature, it gradually lost its vitality.

Rumble!

The blood-mutated creature fell, turning into a corpse.

It was the first Blood Mutant creature to be killed.

"Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor, let's go help the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors!" Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor responded.

Soon, Ye Tian and Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor killed the other Blood Transformation Realm creatures one by one.

As these Blood Transformation Realm creatures became fewer and fewer, the situation became clear.

"You outsiders, I'm going to kill you!"

The poisonous dragon roared.

However, he was entangled by the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor and could only watch as his men were constantly killed.

Finally, in addition to the poisonous dragon, the last Blood Transformation Realm creature was also besieged and killed by many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors.

After killing all the creatures of the Blood Transformation Realm, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm began to slaughter the other creatures of the Dark Sea Fragments, so that the speed of killing was much faster.

Of course, the most important thing for them is to kill the poisonous dragon, and if the poisonous dragon does not die, the crisis will still exist.

Ye Tian, Sword Feather Heavenly Ancestor, and several other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors prepared to assist the Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor in dealing with the poisonous dragon.

Bang!!!!!

Many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors besieged the poisonous dragon, and if anyone was severely injured, they would retreat, and the other Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors would be on top.

Abrupt.

A Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor was instantly exploded by the poisonous dragon's tail, but this Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestor quickly recovered his body and immediately retreated, not daring to go up again.

The situation of the poisonous dragon was even worse, it was torn apart by a famous blood transformation realm heavenly ancestor, and its injuries became more and more serious.

And.

Ye Tian's Extreme Technique could also hurt it, making it very painful.

The poisonous dragon stared at Ye Tian with a fixed gaze, forcibly withstood the attacks of other Heavenly Ancestors, and then rushed in front of Ye Tian, and the claws of the poisonous dragon instantly leaped over and hit Ye Tian's body.

However, Ye Tian's body defense was too high, and after taking this blow hard, he was only broken through the ten-armed golden body and other defensive immeasurable magic skills, and the injury was not serious, and he could still fight.

With the passage of time, many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors were not lightly injured, but the poisonous dragon was also about to die.

"Please don't kill me, I can give you all the treasures!"

The poisonous dragon finally panicked.

However, the many Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors did not stop, they didn't want the poisonous dragon to live.

Even if the poisonous dragon has a lot of treasures, it can be found if it is killed, and it does not need to be given by the poisonous dragon.

"Die!"

"Die!"

"Die!"

The Blood Transformation Realm Heavenly Ancestors attacked wildly, and finally completely wiped out the vitality of the poisonous dragon and killed it.

"Kill all the creatures in the other parts of the Sea Fragments, and don't leave a single one behind!"

Dragon Tooth Heavenly Ancestor said.

"Hmm!"

One by one, the Heavenly Ancestors of the Blood Transformation Realm responded and immediately shuttled to various parts of the Dark Sea Fragments to clean up other Dark Sea creatures, striving not to let go of a Dark Sea creature.
